title: Rockford Meyer
compiled_truth: Rockford Meyer is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (1999-12-20 to 2001-05-30), Rockford Meyer sent 13 and received 79 emails, totalling 92 interactions. Top correspondents: [Stanley Horton](people/stanley-horton) (11), [Rod Hayslett](people/rod-hayslett) (2), [Cindy Stark](people/cindy-stark) (2), [Jordan Hunter](people/jordan-hunter) (2), [Wiley Cauthen](people/wiley-cauthen) (2).
